    "pros": "The application demonstrates a clear research vision focused on anticoagulation safety and a career trajectory towards international leadership (g.1.a). The training plan is exceptionally well-justified with specific courses (Oxford, LSHTM) and mentorship arrangements (g.1.c). Strong mentorship and institutional support are evidenced by named mentors and structured supervision frameworks (g.1.d).",
    "drawbacks": "While the vision is clear, the specific 'distinctive' nature of the ideas relies heavily on the applicant's prior feedback, which is well-addressed but could be more explicitly framed as a novel paradigm shift in the summary."

    "pros": "The applicant clearly articulates why this award is the right next step, specifically to gain implementation science skills and transition to multi-centre work, directly addressing prior reviewer feedback (g.2.a). The plan builds on existing PK expertise while enabling new skills in epidemiology and implementation (g.2.c). Partnerships with NHS trusts and international bodies (Anticoagulation Forum) are clearly outlined (g.2.d).",
    "drawbacks": "The development of partnerships with industry or charity organisations is less detailed compared to NHS and academic partnerships, though Thrombosis UK is mentioned."
